data.title: Sodastream offers $10,000 for craziest sparkling drink recipe on Instagram in the U.S. campaign.
data.description: Sodastream's "Made by Me" campaign is calling on individuals across the United States to share their creative drink concoctions on Instagram. The campaign aims to find the most innovative drink idea creator in America and is offering a prize of $10,000 to the winning submission. The initiative, launched on July 31, 2025, encourages participants to showcase their wildest drink recipes for a chance to win the cash reward. Participants can join the competition by posting their unique drink creations on Instagram, contributing to an exciting quest for the most original beverage concept.

data.title: Legends at James Hardie Pro Football Hall of Fame Invitational build home for a Canton family.
data.description: In Canton, Ohio on July 31, 2025, James Hardie Building Products Inc. collaborated with Pro Football Hall of Fame legends to offer the keys to a cost-effective new residence for Shardae and an undisclosed number of individuals. James Hardie is a prominent supplier of exterior home and outdoor living solutions.

data.title: Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) reported Q2 2025 revenue of $67.13 billion, an 11% YoY increase driven by Evernorth Health Services. Adjusted earnings per share were $7.20, outperforming analysts' $7.13 estimates. Adjusted income from operations rose 1% to $1.93 billion.
data.description: Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) released its second-quarter 2025 financial results, reporting revenue of $67.13 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $62.46 billion. Sales saw an 11% increase from the previous year, attributed mainly to the performance of Evernorth Health Services, driven by growth in existing client relationships and specialty pharmacy. The company's adjusted earnings per share stood at $7.20, higher than the expected $7.13. Adjusted income from operations for the same period rose by 1% to $1.93 billion, reflecting strong growth in Evernorth Health Services and Corporate segments, partially offset by anticipated rise in stop loss medical costs in Cigna Healthcare. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Treehouse Foods (NYSE: THS) reports Q2 results with sales increasing 1.2% to $801.4 million, beating estimates. Stock falls 7%.
data.description: Shares of Treehouse Foods, Inc. (NYSE: THS) saw a decline of over 7% following the release of their second-quarter results. The company exceeded expectations from Wall Street, reporting adjusted earnings of 17 cents per share compared to the 10 cents consensus. Their sales also rose by 1.2% year over year to $801.4 million, surpassing the estimated $787 million. Despite the positive earnings report and an increased full-year revenue forecast, investors responded minimally, causing the stock to drop during morning trading. The growth in net sales was largely attributed to the acquisition of the private brand tea business.

data.title: Cybersecurity whistleblower gets $1.9M reward in $10M False Claims Act case against Illumina, Inc.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, it was reported that the United States Department of Justice had resolved a False Claims Act qui tam whistleblower lawsuit against Illumina, Inc., a publicly traded American biotechnology company. The investigation was initiated after a Whistleblower complaint was received on September 8, 2023. The lawsuit alleged fraudulent claims, and the resolution included a financial settlement. The exact amount of the settlement was not disclosed in the report.

data.title: Los Angeles designates August 1, 2025, as "KCON Day" to recognize K-POP festival's cultural impact. KCON LA returns with top acts like NCT 127, MONSTA X, and more.
data.description: Los Angeles has declared August 1, 2025, as "KCON Day" to honor the K-POP Fan and Artist festival for its significant impact since starting in 2012. This is the first time KCON LA has received official recognition at the city level. The event will take place from August 1–3 at the LA Convention Center and Crypto.com Arena. KCON LA 2025 will showcase popular acts like NCT 127, MONSTA X, ZEROBASEONE, izna, and HxW (SEVENTEEN).
